markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, process refinement, and future initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Process Bottleneck:** Udemy's internal review process is the primary bottleneck, not content delivery timing. The team will adopt a "fix later" model to unblock publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** A new Content OS column now maps content to pillar pages, ensuring strategic alignment. Internal linking will be prioritized, focused on Udemy Business content.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [**Image Workflow:** Growth X will create on-brand images to reduce Udemy's design lift. Justin will provide Udemy's standard image overlays to ensure consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [**Meeting Rescheduled:** The weekly sync moves to Wednesdays at 9 AM PT to accommodate Justin's schedule. A bi-weekly cadence will be considered once the workflow is stable.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)

## Topics

### Process & Workflow

  - [**Review Bottleneck:** Udemy's internal review process is the main bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
      - [**Cause:** Reviewers have full schedules, delaying feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
      - [**Solution:** Adopt a "fix later" model to unblock publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [**Content Delivery:** Katya will deliver content by Wednesday instead of Thursday to provide more review time.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [**Meeting Cadence:** The sync moves to Wednesdays at 9 AM PT. A bi-weekly cadence will be considered once the process is stable.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)

### Content Strategy & Quality

  - [**Content OS Update:** A new column maps content to pillar pages, using the UB scorecard for alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [**Internal Linking:**](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Manually adding links to unpublished, related content is inefficient.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
      - [**Solution:** Katya will investigate a dev artifact to enable automated placeholder links.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
      - [**Guideline:** Prioritize linking to Udemy Business content over consumer blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [**Formatting:** Justin requested more H3s to improve readability and break up long sections.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [**Content Duplication:** The team will avoid duplicating content.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
      - [**Example:** Udemy's "MCP article" was a one-off product launch piece.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
      - [**Guideline:** Growth X will avoid AI articles to prevent conflicts.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

### Image & Visuals

  - [**Goal:** Reduce Udemy's design team lift by having Growth X create on-brand images.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [**Action:** Justin will provide Udemy's standard image overlays for Growth X to use.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [**Future Initiative (2026):** Add in-text visuals (tables, infographics) to improve readability.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
      - [**Constraint:** Visuals must be localization-friendly (e.g., text-free) or easily translatable.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)

### GA4 Access

  - [**Status:** The process is blocked by legal.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [**Blocker:** Udemy requires a custom Data Processing Agreement (DPA), not Growth X's standard one.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Udemy sent its DPA to Growth X for redlining.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [Deliver "implementation cluster" content (bulk by EOD, final pieces by Friday).](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [Deliver "Digital Skills Gap" edits (by lunch today).](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
      - [Investigate automated placeholder links for internal linking.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
      - [Reschedule the weekly sync to Wednesdays at 9 AM PT.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
      - [Review the Udemy DPA for redlining.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
      - [Create an "AI topic insights" artifact for Udemy review (early Dec).](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
      - [Research in-text visual examples for the next sync.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [**Justin:**](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
      - [Publish reviewed blogs (by next Wednesday).](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
      - [Provide Udemy's standard image overlays to Katya.](https://fathom.video/share/Udn4wEjGQcR_gYM9cxdzUkY-NssfTCFQ?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
